Package com.linkedin.venice.protocols.controller

Class ClusterAdminOpsGrpcServiceGrpc.ClusterAdminOpsGrpcServiceFutureStub

java.lang.Object
io.grpc.stub.AbstractStub<S>
io.grpc.stub.AbstractFutureStub<ClusterAdminOpsGrpcServiceGrpc.ClusterAdminOpsGrpcServiceFutureStub>
com.linkedin.venice.protocols.controller.ClusterAdminOpsGrpcServiceGrpc.ClusterAdminOpsGrpcServiceFutureStub
Enclosing class:
ClusterAdminOpsGrpcServiceGrpc
public static final class ClusterAdminOpsGrpcServiceGrpc.ClusterAdminOpsGrpcServiceFutureStub extends io.grpc.stub.AbstractFutureStub<ClusterAdminOpsGrpcServiceGrpc.ClusterAdminOpsGrpcServiceFutureStub>
A stub to allow clients to do ListenableFuture-style rpc calls to service ClusterAdminOpsGrpcService.
